        {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Explore to the east, find and join the guild of necromancers"},
        {"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Hire Blarp, the Hero of Dark as my spy master"},
        {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Win lots of money\r\n>Hire soldiers\r\n>Crush rebellion with soldiers and skeletons"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 8, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it's very complex text based kingdom management simulation"},
        {"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it has its' own kind of charm"},
        {"aspect": "platform_access", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The only thing I would like is Linux port..."}
    ]},

    {"idx": 16, "aspects": []},
    {"idx": 17, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "controls", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The controller compatibility works very well"},
        {"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The colored graphics, like a Commodore 64 game, is nice and can bring a sense of nostalgia"},
        {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The soundtrack is spectacular, an agradable 8-bit sound for the ears"},
        {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "In the main game itself is not large"},
        {"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it will spend a few more hours if you are hunting achievements"},
        {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "they are almost impossible - if you are patient, a bit of training and soon you can"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 18, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Very deceptively challenging"},
        {"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "1980's style and charm"},
        {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a *REALLY* good sound-track"},
        {"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "just go in accepting that and enjoy"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 19, "aspects": []},
    {"idx": 20, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the key to free the refugee hostages failed to appear"},
        {"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "an NPC, by the name mom'a refused dialog before I even got the quest"},
        {"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the key failed to spawn"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 21, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Fun game, very much a sequel to Wasteland 2 and the original Fallouts"},
        {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Visually quite good, as far as isometric turn based rpg strat games go"},
        {"aspect": "voice_acting", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Almost all dialogue has quality voice over for them"},
        {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "There is a giant statue of Ronald Reagan controlled by a 100 year old AI version of Reagan"},
        {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The game is a bit short, without the DLCs you've got about 30 hours from start to finish"},
        {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "On higher difficulty settings, if you don't properly plan out your character level ups, you can end up with a real hard end game"},
        {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "there are some cookie cutter OP builds"},
        {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Most of the difficulty comes from sheer chance on your to hit and resist rolls, besides using cover, there is very little actual strategy in combat"},
        {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Steeltown DLC adds some crappy new stacking status effects, that are more annoying than interesting to play around with"},
        {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Cult of the holy detonation DLC seems to be a bit lacking in stuff to do"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 22, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Super fun game that plays like a mix of Xcom and Fallout"},
        {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The combat and squad building/RPG elements are quite fun"},
        {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Music and sound are top notch and usually appropriate for the mood"},
        {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Some of the characters in the game are quite wild"},
        {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "most quests and places you come across are pretty interesting"},
        {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The story is good"},
        {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "unfortunately the writing is very poor"},
        {"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "results of some dialogue choices make no logical sense, and apparently there's never any way to change any outcome"},
        {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Kinda wish there was more content and quests with existing factions/cities"}
    ]},
    {"idx": 23, "aspects": []},

    ]},

        {"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Only install if you're unemployed or have genuinely given up on having a life"}
